context: Spotify's 2025 Wrapped for India marked a turning point with I-Pop — independent Indian music released outside film soundtracks — accounting for five of the top 10 most-streamed songs. 'Raanjhan' by Sachet-Parampara topped the chart with 246 million streams. Newcomers like Aditya Rikhari and Anuv Jain brought a singer-songwriter wave into the mainstream alongside Arijit Singh's enduring dominance.
